runtime_source: main (post-trkC merge, with B6 T2/T3 cherry-picked into trkC GATE)

evidence_inheritance.rationale: Live-tenant evidence captured after merge of feat/m365-cps-trkC (which carries A+B+C work) into main. Track B parent phases B1-B6 are exercised end-to-end via these results plus their backing parent-phase smoke tests merged in trkB.
evidence_inheritance.note: T2 will rebump runtime_version_observed (0.1.3 -> 1.2.0). The pre-bump live coverage is the correct baseline to prove that everything Track B introduced works on Graph BEFORE we cut the new pack.

B1_sharepoint.expected: device-code session lacks SharePoint auth_modes; auth_required is the correct denial.

B4_health_reports.expected: Health/Reports actions excluded from device-code session per registry; preflight partitions them into blocked_by_auth_mode.

B5_directory_teams.expected: Directory/Teams actions also excluded under current device-code+3-scope session; preflight partitions them into blocked_by_auth_mode.

B6_auth_mode_tiers.expected: Tier validation rejects invalid tier; valid tier persists via keychain across runtime rebuild.

downstream_dependencies.T2_version_bump: Authorized to bump 0.1.3 -> 1.2.0 once T1 is captured.
downstream_dependencies.T3_pack_build: Authorized to build IntegrationPacks/M365/1.2.0/com.smarthaus.m365-1.2.0.ucp.tar.gz once T2 lands.
downstream_dependencies.T4_release_artifacts: Authorized to add M365_120_RELEASE_SPEC and alias M365_RELEASE_SPEC at it.
downstream_dependencies.T5_sha_pin: Authorized to pin expected_bundle_sha256 from the freshly built bundle.
downstream_dependencies.T6_governance: Authorized to log closure across CHANGELOG / EXECUTION_PLAN / ACTION_LOG.
